[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001100100 3
1 0100100110 4
2 1100000010 3
3 0100010000 2
4 0000111001 4
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0011101001 5

01 10 0010111010 5
12 21 0010000000 1
23 32 0011000001 3
34 43 0001100100 3 match 0
45 54 0100100110 4 match 1
56 65 1100000010 3 match 2
67 76 0100010000 2 match 3
70 07 0000111001 4 match 4

02 20 1011000001 4
13 31 0010101100 4
24 42 0101000000 2
35 53 0000100101 3
46 64 0100010010 3
57 75 0100100101 4
60 06 1010010010 4
71 17 0000111100 4

03 30 0011101001 5 match 7
14 41 0000110110 4
25 52 1100000001 3
36 63 0010000000 1
47 74 0100110100 4
50 05 1000100011 4
61 16 0010010010 3
72 27 0100000001 2

15 51 0000100110 3
26 62 1110000000 3
37 73 0000101101 4
